runnerManager.testDescription: Verify a valid user logs in and reaches the authenticated shell — the search menu and welcome message are visible.

runnerManager.testTitle: Login fails with an invalid password
runnerManager.testDescription: Verify login is rejected when the username is valid but the password is wrong, and the invalid-credentials error is shown.

runnerManager.testTitle: Login fails with an invalid username
runnerManager.testDescription: Verify login is rejected when the username is invalid, and the invalid-credentials error is shown.

runnerManager.testTitle: Login fails with invalid username and password
runnerManager.testDescription: Verify login is rejected when both the username and password are invalid, and the invalid-credentials error is shown.
